title: OpenPrinter
summary:
OpenPrinter is introduced as a repairable, compact, and robust printer designed for longevity and sustainability. It features a fully refillable ink system compatible with widely available HP 63/302/803 series cartridges, significantly reducing printing costs by eliminating DRM and offering low-cost ink refills. Users can independently use black or color cartridges, preventing common printing frustrations when one color is empty.

A key innovation is its versatile paper handling, supporting standard sheets (A4, A3, Letter, Tabloid) alongside paper rolls (29.7 cm / 11 inch wide) for printing banners, strips, and customized formats, facilitated by an integrated cutter. Its compact design allows for flexible placement on a desk or mounted on a wall.

Built with standard and open-source components (including a Raspberry Pi Zero W and STM32), OpenPrinter is easy to assemble, maintain, and repair, extending its lifespan and reducing electronic waste. It operates with an open-source print server (CUPS), ensuring driver-free compatibility across Windows, MacOS, Linux, Android, and iOS for local and network printing. Customization is also encouraged through 3D-printable parts. While it lacks an integrated scanner, it recommends using smartphone scanning applications as an efficient alternative.

Open Tools plans to release open-source files post-product finalization and will sell ink refill kits. The project is currently available for pre-order through a crowdfunding campaign on Crowdsupply.
chinese_title: 打开打印机
chinese_summary:
OpenPrinter 被介绍为一款可修复、紧凑、坚固的打印机，旨在实现长寿命和可持续性。它采用完全可再填充墨水系统，兼容市面上常见的惠普HP 63/302/803系列墨盒，通过消除DRM并提供低成本墨水加注，显著降低打印成本。用户可以独立使用黑色或彩色墨盒，避免了当一种颜色墨水用尽时常见的打印困扰。

一项关键创新是其多功能纸张处理能力，支持标准纸张（A4、A3、Letter、Tabloid），同时也可使用卷筒纸（宽29.7厘米/11英寸）打印横幅、长条和定制格式，并辅以集成裁切器。其紧凑设计使其可以灵活地放置在桌面上或安装在墙上。

OpenPrinter 采用标准和开源组件（包括树莓派Raspberry Pi Zero W和STM32）构建，易于组装、维护和修理，从而延长其使用寿命并减少电子垃圾。它通过开源打印服务器（CUPS）运行，确保在Windows、MacOS、Linux、Android和iOS等平台上的免驱动兼容性，支持本地和网络打印。此外，它还鼓励通过3D打印部件进行定制。虽然它没有集成扫描仪，但建议使用智能手机扫描应用程序作为高效的替代方案。

Open Tools 计划在产品最终确定后发布开源文件，并将出售墨水补充套件。该项目目前可通过Crowdsupply上的众筹活动进行预订。

title: OpenWrt One – Open Hardware Router
summary:
The provided text explains a bot detection system called Anubis, implemented to protect servers from being overwhelmed by AI companies' large-scale content scraping. This behavior can crash websites, making resources inaccessible to all users.

Anubis is a temporary solution that utilizes a Proof-of-Work (PoW) mechanism, similar to Hashcash, originally proposed to reduce spam. The core idea is that the extra computational burden is negligible for individual users but significantly increases cumulative costs for large-scale scrapers, making mass data extraction more difficult.

This system is a placeholder while more sophisticated methods, such as fingerprinting and identifying headless browsers (e.g., by font rendering), are developed to avoid presenting challenges to legitimate users. Anubis requires modern JavaScript features to function, and plugins like JShelter might block these, necessitating their disablement for the domain. The text concludes by stating that JavaScript is currently required for this verification due to the changing "social contract" of website hosting by AI companies, with non-JavaScript solutions still under development.
chinese_title: OpenWrt One — 开源硬件路由器
chinese_summary:
所提供的文本解释了一种名为Anubis的僵尸程序检测系统，该系统旨在保护服务器免受AI公司大规模内容抓取造成的过载。这种行为可能导致网站崩溃，使所有用户无法访问资源。

Anubis是一种临时解决方案，它利用工作量证明（PoW）机制，类似于最初为减少垃圾邮件而提出的Hashcash。其核心思想是，额外的计算负担对于单个用户来说可以忽略不计，但会显著增加大规模抓取者的累计成本，从而使批量数据提取变得更加困难。

该系统是一个占位符，同时正在开发更复杂的方法，例如指纹识别和识别无头浏览器（例如通过字体渲染），以避免给合法用户带来挑战。Anubis需要现代JavaScript功能才能运行，而像JShelter这样的插件可能会阻止这些功能，因此需要为该域名禁用它们。文本最后指出，由于AI公司在网站托管方面“社会契约”的变化，目前需要JavaScript进行此验证，而无需JavaScript的解决方案仍在开发中。

title: CoMaps – FOSS Offline Maps
summary:
CoMaps is a Free and Open Source Software (FOSS) offline map application designed for hiking, biking, and driving, prioritizing user privacy and community collaboration. It enables users to navigate and search waypoints without internet access or mobile data, relying solely on GPS, ideal for trips abroad or remote trails.

A core feature is its commitment to privacy: CoMaps does not track users, identify people, or collect any personal information, a claim verified by an Exodus audit. The app also boasts efficient battery usage.

CoMaps is entirely community-driven, with users contributing by adding locations to OpenStreetMap, providing feature feedback, and contributing code on Codeberg. As a fork of Organic Maps and Maps.Me, it embodies the spirit of open-source development. The project aims to provide a free, community-built tool for private navigation, empowering users to explore the world with freedom and peace of mind.
chinese_title: CoMaps – 自由开源离线地图
chinese_summary:
CoMaps 是一款免费开源软件 (FOSS) 离线地图应用，专为徒步、骑行和驾车设计，并优先考虑用户隐私和社区协作。它让用户能够在没有互联网连接或移动数据的情况下导航和搜索航点，仅依靠 GPS，非常适合出国旅行或探索偏远小径。

其核心功能是对隐私的承诺：CoMaps 不会跟踪用户、识别个人或收集任何个人信息，这一说法已通过 Exodus 审计验证。该应用还以电池效率高著称。

CoMaps 完全由社区驱动，用户通过向 OpenStreetMap 添加地点、提供功能反馈以及在 Codeberg 上贡献代码来做出贡献。作为 Organic Maps 和 Maps.Me 的一个分支，它体现了开源开发的精神。该项目旨在提供一个免费、由社区构建的私密导航工具，赋能用户自由安心地探索世界。

title: Resetting Xbox
summary:
Xbox is undergoing its most significant restructuring, a "reset," driven by an unhealthy business model with low margins, a declining install base, and slower-than-expected growth from initiatives like Game Pass. The company also cites an industry-wide hardware crisis and a fragmented structure with too many management layers.

The restructuring involves reducing the global team by approximately 3,200 by FY27, with 1,600 role eliminations happening immediately. Four studios are leaving Xbox: Compulsion Games and Double Fine Productions will become independent, while Ninja Theory and Undead Labs are joining new ownership. Arkane (France) is exploring strategic options. Mojang and King will now report directly to Asha, recognized for their platform scale. Reductions are also occurring across other units, but no publicly announced game projects are cancelled.

The "reset" focuses on three areas:
1.  **Content Portfolio:** Streamlining content strategy by divesting certain studios and refocusing investment with greater discipline.
2.  **Platform:** Simplifying the organization by reducing management layers from up to 14 to a maximum of 5, fostering a flatter structure, and streamlining operations, including a 50% reduction in vendor spend.
3.  **Operations:** Establishing a Chief Operating Officer role, filled by Helen Chiang, with end-to-end P&L responsibility to unify business models and enhance accountability.

Despite these painful changes, Xbox aims for a larger future, investing with greater focus and discipline, with the goal of returning to growth by 2027 and entertaining over a billion people daily.
chinese_title: 重置 Xbox
chinese_summary:
Xbox正在经历其最重大的重组，即一次“重启”，这缘于其不健康的商业模式，其特点是利润率低、装机量萎缩以及Game Pass等举措的增长不及预期。该公司还指出，全行业正面临硬件危机，且公司内部结构碎片化，管理层级过多。

此次重组涉及在2027财年前裁减全球团队约3,200人，其中1,600个职位将立即裁撤。有四家工作室将离开Xbox：Compulsion Games和Double Fine Productions将成为独立公司，而Ninja Theory和Undead Labs则被新所有者收购。Arkane（法国）正在探索战略选择。Mojang和King将直接向Asha汇报，鉴于其平台规模。其他部门也将进行裁员，但没有公开宣布的游戏项目被取消。

此次“重启”聚焦于三个领域：
1.  **内容组合：** 通过剥离某些工作室，并以更严格的纪律重新聚焦投资来优化内容战略。
2.  **平台：** 将管理层级从最多14层减少到最多5层，从而简化组织结构，构建更扁平的结构，并优化运营，包括将供应商支出减少50%。
3.  **运营：** 设立由Helen Chiang担任的首席运营官职位，拥有端到端盈亏责任，以统一商业模式并加强问责制。

尽管面临这些痛苦的变革，Xbox仍致力于一个更宏大的未来，以更集中的重点和更严格的纪律进行投资，目标是到2027年恢复增长，并每天为超过十亿人提供娱乐。

title: GLM 5.2 and the coming AI margin collapse
summary:
This article posits that open-weight models, exemplified by GLM 5.2, are about to trigger a significant "AI margin collapse," fundamentally altering the economics of the industry. The author argues that previous market reactions, like the "DeepSeek moment," misunderstood the true cost structure of AI, where upfront training costs are fixed, but inference—which scales with demand—is the primary driver of profit for frontier labs like Anthropic and OpenAI, yielding an estimated 90% gross margin.

GLM 5.2 from Z.ai is highlighted as the first open-weights model to genuinely rival the quality of frontier models like Opus and GPT. While acknowledging its current limitations—slower speed (due to extensive "thinking"), lack of vision support, and poor web search capabilities—the author finds its core performance nearly indistinguishable from Opus. Crucially, its OpenAI/Anthropic API compatibility makes switching providers "absolutely trivial," eliminating traditional vendor lock-in.

The cost differential is stark: GLM 5.2 is priced around $4.40/MTok, less than 20% of Opus or GPT 5.5. Even accounting for higher token usage due to its "thinking" process, it's expected to be over 50% cheaper for comparable quality, with further cost reductions anticipated from serving stack optimizations and alternative hardware. While Z.ai's terms might raise enterprise privacy concerns, the open-weights nature allows for self-hosting or other compliant providers.

The article concludes that the combination of high quality, low switching costs, and dramatically reduced inference pricing will inevitably compress the lucrative margins currently enjoyed by frontier AI labs, with the second part of the series exploring the full industry implications.
chinese_title: GLM 5.2 与 即将来临的 AI 利润率崩塌
chinese_summary:
本文认为，以GLM 5.2为代表的开源模型即将引发一场重大的“AI利润崩溃”，从根本上改变该行业的经济结构。作者指出，此前市场反应（如“DeepSeek时刻”）误解了AI的真实成本结构：前期训练成本是固定的，而推理（随需求增长而扩展）才是Anthropic和OpenAI等头部实验室的主要利润驱动力，带来约90%的毛利率。

Z.ai的GLM 5.2被认为是首个在质量上能真正媲美Opus和GPT等前沿模型的开源模型。作者承认其当前存在局限性——速度较慢（因其需要大量“思考”）、缺乏视觉支持、网络搜索能力较弱——但发现其核心性能与Opus几乎无异。更关键的是，它与OpenAI/Anthropic API的兼容性使得切换供应商“轻而易举”，从而消除了传统的供应商锁定。

成本差异是巨大的：GLM 5.2的定价约为每百万token 4.40美元，不到Opus或GPT 5.5的20%。即使考虑到其“思考”过程会导致更高的token用量，在同等质量下，预计仍会便宜50%以上，且随着服务栈优化和替代硬件的应用，成本还会进一步降低。虽然Z.ai的条款可能引起企业的隐私担忧，但其开源特性允许企业自行部署或选择其他合规的服务提供商。

文章总结道，高质量、低切换成本以及大幅降低的推理定价的结合，将不可避免地压缩当前由头部AI实验室享受的利润丰厚的利润空间。该系列文章的第二部分将探讨其对整个行业的全面影响。

title: Fable turned reMarkable into Tom Riddle's diary from Harry Potter
summary:
"riddle" transforms the reMarkable Paper Pro into a digital Tom Riddle's diary. Users write with their pen, the ink fades, and a personalized, handwritten reply appears stroke-by-stroke on the paper-like display, then also fades away, maintaining an immersive, screen-glow-free experience.

Installation is easiest via `remagic` or by installing a prebuilt bundle, requiring the device to be in developer mode with a launcher like AppLoad. The app primarily runs in a "takeover" mode, stopping the standard reMarkable UI for optimal e-ink responsiveness; exiting is done with a five-finger tap.

The diary remembers past interactions: users can ask to "show me what I wrote about..." to recall previous pages or "what do you remember?" for a list of remembered moments. Every finished page, including your strokes, a transcription, and Tom's reply, is stored locally on the tablet, allowing the diary to follow conversations and conjure past content in faded ink.

Replies come from an "oracle" – a vision LLM that processes a PNG of your handwritten page. Users can configure this backend with an OpenAI-compatible API (requiring an API key) or a local `pi` process. Both options stream replies sentence-by-sentence.

"riddle" modifies the device, runs as root, and directly controls the e-ink engine. It's tested on the reMarkable Paper Pro (OS 3.26–3.27), and users proceed at their own risk, with SSH access recommended for recovery. Only rasterized page images are sent to the configured oracle; no telemetry is collected, and replies aren't stored to disk by the app itself.
chinese_title: Fable 将 reMarkable 变成了《哈利·波特》中汤姆·里德尔的日记。
chinese_summary:
“riddle”将reMarkable Paper Pro变为一本数字化的汤姆·里德尔的日记。用户用笔书写，墨迹随即淡去，个性化的手写回复则在纸张般的显示屏上逐笔出现，随后也淡去，从而保持一种沉浸式、无屏幕眩光的体验。

安装最简单的方式是通过`remagic`或安装预构建包，这需要设备处于开发者模式并使用像AppLoad这样的启动器。该应用主要在“接管”模式下运行，停止标准的reMarkable用户界面以实现最佳的电子墨水响应速度；退出则通过五指轻触完成。

日记会记住过去的互动：用户可以询问“给我看看我写了什么关于...”以回顾之前的页面，或询问“你记得什么？”以获取记忆时刻的列表。每完成一页，包括您的笔迹、转录内容和汤姆的回复，都本地存储在平板上，使日记能够跟踪对话并以淡去的墨迹形式呈现过去的内容。

回复来自一个“神谕”——一个处理您手写页面PNG图像的视觉大语言模型（vision LLM）。用户可以使用与OpenAI兼容的API（需要API密钥）或本地`pi`进程来配置此后端。两种选项都逐句地传输回复。

“riddle”会修改设备，以root权限运行，并直接控制电子墨水引擎。它已在reMarkable Paper Pro (OS 3.26–3.27) 上进行测试，用户需自行承担风险，建议通过SSH访问进行恢复。只有栅格化的页面图像会被发送到配置好的“神谕”；不收集任何遥测数据，并且应用本身不会将回复存储到磁盘。

title: StreetComplete: Fixing OpenStreetMap, one tiny quest at a time
summary:
StreetComplete is an OpenStreetMap surveyor app designed to simplify the process of improving map data. It identifies missing information in a user's vicinity and presents it as "quests" on a map. Users complete these quests by physically visiting the location, answering a simple question based on their observations, and their contributions are directly added to OpenStreetMap under their name, without needing another map editor.

The project encourages community involvement through its GitHub page, a Slack chat for discussion, opportunities to translate the app, and options to donate as a show of appreciation. Further details about the app, including updates, frequently asked questions, and privacy information, are also provided.
chinese_title: StreetComplete：修复OpenStreetMap，一次一个微任务
chinese_summary:
StreetComplete is an OpenStreetMap surveyor app designed to simplify the process of improving map data. It identifies missing information in a user's vicinity and presents it as "quests" on a map. Users complete these quests by physically visiting the location, answering a simple question based on their observations, and their contributions are directly added to OpenStreetMap under their name, without needing another map editor.

The project encourages community involvement through its GitHub page, a Slack chat for discussion, opportunities to translate the app, and options to donate as a show of appreciation. Further details about the app, including updates, frequently asked questions, and privacy information, are also provided.
